title: Law Escapes Blackbeard’s Ambush
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Blackbeard, Unknown person #10, Kuzan, Law, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.
scene: The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...and get your ass back in uniform!

dialogue.speaker: Kuzan
dialogue.text: You're as direct as ever, Garp-san...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've always loved that about you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's why I'm not gonna do any of those things.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've decided to live life on my own terms!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: tenth captain of the blackbeard pirates KUZAN

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your number one protege versus your new favorite. Can you kill one to save the other?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't stop me like that, you dumbassi

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I THOUGH IT TAUGHT YOU TO ‘LIVE IN THE NOW!’

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You can't even call yourselves pirates anymore...!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: THE POLAR TANG, THE HEART PIRATES' SUBMARINE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is currently sinking to the ocean floor... torn to pieces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are still livin' on pirate island!! I bet they'll be thrilled...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IF I BRING 'EM YOUR HEART!! WE'LL HAVE A TOAST!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I can't guarantee it'll work, okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now what should we do with the op-op fruit? Sell or use it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't suppose you'd fancy makin' me immortal?!

summary: This part advances the Winner Island and Hachinosu Fallout through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
